book: THE GOSPEL ACCORDING TO ST. MATTHEW

verses.text: And Jesus went out, and departed from the temple: and his disciples came to him for to shew him the buildings of the temple.

And Jesus said unto them, \+w See ye\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w these things\+w*? \+w verily\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w There shall\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w be left\+w* \+w here\+w* \+w one stone\+w* \+w upon\+w* \+w another\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w be thrown down\+w*.
¶ And as he sat upon the mount of Olives, the disciples came unto him privately, saying, Tell us, when shall these things be? and what shall be the sign of thy coming, and of the end of the world?
And Jesus answered and said unto them, \+w Take heed that\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w man\+w* \+w deceive\+w* \+w you\+w*.
\+w For\+w* \+w many\+w* \+w shall come\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w name\+w*, \+w saying\+w*, \+w I\+w* \+w am\+w* \+w Christ\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w shall deceive\+w* \+w many\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w ye shall\+w* \+w hear\+w* \+w of wars\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w rumours\+w* \+w of wars\+w*: \+w see that\+w* \+w ye be\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w troubled\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w all\+w* \+add these things\+add* \+w must\+w* \+w come to pass\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w the end\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w not yet\+w*.

\+w For\+w* \+w nation\+w* \+w shall rise\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w nation\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w kingdom\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w kingdom\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w there shall be\+w* \+w famines\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w pestilences\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w earthquakes\+w*, \+w in divers\+w* \+w places\+w*.
\+w All\+w* \+w these\+w* \+add are\+add* \+w the beginning\+w* \+w of sorrows\+w*.

\+w Then\+w* \+w shall they deliver\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w up to be\+w* \+w afflicted\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w shall kill\+w* \+w you\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w ye shall be\+w* \+w hated\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w nations\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w name’s\+w* \+w sake\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w then\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w many\+w* \+w be offended\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w shall betray\+w* \+w one another\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w shall hate\+w* \+w one another\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w many\+w* \+w false prophets\+w* \+w shall rise\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w shall deceive\+w* \+w many\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w because\+w* \+w iniquity\+w* \+w shall abound\+w*, \+w the love\+w* \+w of many\+w* \+w shall wax cold\+w*.
\+w But\+w* \+w he that shall endure\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w the end\+w*, \+w the same\+w* \+w shall be saved\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w gospel\+w* \+w of the kingdom\+w* \+w shall be preached\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w the world\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w a witness\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w nations\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w then\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w the end\+w* \+w come\+w*.

\+w When\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w therefore\+w* \+w shall see\+w* \+w the abomination\+w* \+w of desolation\+w*, \+w spoken of\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w Daniel\+w* \+w the prophet\+w*, \+w stand\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the\+w* \+w holy\+w* \+w place\+w*, (\+w whoso readeth\+w*, \+w let him understand\+w*:)
\+w Then\+w* \+w let them\+w* \+w which be\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w Judaea\+w* \+w flee\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w the mountains\+w*:
\+w Let him\+w* \+w which is\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w the housetop\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w come down\+w* \+w to take\+w* \+w any thing\+w* \+w out of\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w house\+w*:
\+w Neither\+w* \+w let him\+w* \+w which is\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the field\+w* \+w return\+w* \+w back\+w* \+w to take\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w clothes\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w woe\+w* \+w unto them that are\+w* \+w with child\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w to them that give suck\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w those\+w* \+w days\+w*!
\+w But\+w* \+w pray ye\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w flight\+w* \+w be\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w in the winter\+w*, \+w neither\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w the sabbath day\+w*:

\+w For\+w* \+w then\+w* \+w shall be\+w* \+w great\+w* \+w tribulation\+w*, \+w such as\+w* \+w was\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w since\+w* \+w the beginning\+w* \+w of the world\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w this time\+w*, \+w no\+w*, \+w nor\+w* \+w ever\+w* \+w shall be\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w except\+w* \+w those\+w* \+w days\+w* \+w should be shortened\+w*, \+w there should\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w flesh\+w* \+w be saved\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w the elect’s\+w* \+w sake\+w* \+w those\+w* \+w days\+w* \+w shall be shortened\+w*.

\+w Then\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w any man\+w* \+w shall say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w Lo\+w*, \+w here\+w* \+add is\+add* \+w Christ\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w there\+w*; \+w believe\+w* \+add it\+add* \+w not\+w*.

\+w For\+w* \+w there shall arise\+w* \+w false Christs\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w false prophets\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w shall shew\+w* \+w great\+w* \+w signs\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w wonders\+w*; \+w insomuch that\+w*, \+w if\+w* \+add it were\+add* \+w possible\+w*, \+w they shall deceive\+w* \+w the\+w* \+w very\+w* \+w elect\+w*.
\+w Behold\+w*, \+w I have told\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w before\+w*.

\+w Wherefore\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w they shall say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w Behold\+w*, \+w he is\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the desert\+w*; \+w go\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w forth\+w*: \+w behold\+w*, \+add he is\+add* \+w in\+w* \+w the secret chambers\+w*; \+w believe\+w* \+add it\+add* \+w not\+w*.

\+w For\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w the lightning\+w* \+w cometh\+w* \+w out\+w* \+w of the east\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w shineth\+w* \+w even unto\+w* \+w the west\+w*; \+w so\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w the coming\+w* \+w of the Son\+w* \+w of man\+w* \+w be\+w*.
\+w For\+w* \+w wheresoever\+w* \+w the carcase\+w* \+w is\+w*, \+w there\+w* \+w will\+w* \+w the eagles\+w* \+w be gathered together\+w*.

¶ \+w Immediately\+w* \+w after\+w* \+w the tribulation\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w those\+w* \+w days\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w the sun\+w* \+w be darkened\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the moon\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w give\+w* \+w her\+w* \+w light\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the stars\+w* \+w shall fall\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w heaven\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the powers\+w* \+w of the heavens\+w* \+w shall be shaken\+w*:

\+w And\+w* \+w then\+w* \+w shall appear\+w* \+w the sign\+w* \+w of the Son\+w* \+w of man\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w heaven\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w then\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w the tribes\+w* \+w of the earth\+w* \+w mourn\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w they shall see\+w* \+w the Son\+w* \+w of man\+w* \+w coming\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the clouds\+w* \+w of heaven\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w power\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w great\+w* \+w glory\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w he shall send\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w angels\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w a\+w* \+w great\+w* \+w sound\+w* \+w of a trumpet\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w they shall gather together\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w elect\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w the\+w* \+w four\+w* \+w winds\+w*, \+w from\+w* \+w one end\+w* \+w of heaven\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w the other\+w*.

\+w Now\+w* \+w learn\+w* \+w a parable\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w the fig tree\+w*; \+w When\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w branch\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w yet\+w* \+w tender\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w putteth forth\+w* \+w leaves\+w*, \+w ye know\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w summer\+w* \+add is\+add* \+w nigh\+w*:

\+w So\+w* \+w likewise\+w* \+w ye\+w*, \+w when\+w* \+w ye shall see\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w these things\+w*, \+w know\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w it is\+w* \+w near\+w*, \+add even\+add* \+w at\+w* \+w the doors\+w*.
\+w Verily\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w This\+w* \+w generation\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w pass\+w*, \+w till\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w these things\+w* \+w be fulfilled\+w*.
\+w Heaven\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w earth\+w* \+w shall pass away\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w words\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w pass away\+w*.

¶ \+w But\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w day\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w hour\+w* \+w knoweth\+w* \+w no\+w* \+add man\+add*, no, \+w not\+w* \+w the angels\+w* \+w of heaven\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w only\+w*.
\+w But\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w the days\+w* \+w of Noe\+w* \+add were\+add*, \+w so\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w the coming\+w* \+w of the Son\+w* \+w of man\+w* \+w be\+w*.

\+w For\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the days\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w were\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w the flood\+w* \+w they were eating\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w drinking\+w*, \+w marrying\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w giving in marriage\+w*, \+w until\+w* \+w the day\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w Noe\+w* \+w entered\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w the ark\+w*,

\+w And\+w* \+w knew\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w until\+w* \+w the flood\+w* \+w came\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w took\+w* \+w them all\+w* \+w away\+w*; \+w so\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w the coming\+w* \+w of the Son\+w* \+w of man\+w* \+w be\+w*.
\+w Then\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w two\+w* \+w be\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the field\+w*; \+w the one\+w* \+w shall be taken\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the other\+w* \+w left\+w*.
\+w Two\+w* \+add women shall be\+add* \+w grinding\+w* \+w at\+w* \+w the mill\+w*; \+w the one\+w* \+w shall be taken\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the other\+w* \+w left\+w*.
¶ \+w Watch\+w* \+w therefore\+w*: \+w for\+w* ye know \+w not\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w hour\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w Lord\+w* \+w doth come\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w know\+w* \+w this\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w the goodman of the house\+w* \+w had known\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w watch\+w* \+w the thief\+w* \+w would come\+w*, \+w he would have watched\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w would\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w have suffered\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w house\+w* \+w to be broken up\+w*.
\+w Therefore\+w* \+w be\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w ready\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w such\+w* \+w an hour\+w* \+w as ye think\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w the Son\+w* \+w of man\+w* \+w cometh\+w*.

\+w Who\+w* \+w then\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w a faithful\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w wise\+w* \+w servant\+w*, \+w whom\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w lord\+w* \+w hath made ruler\+w* \+w over\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w household\+w*, \+w to give\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w meat\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w due season\+w*?
\+w Blessed\+w* \+add is\+add* \+w that\+w* \+w servant\+w*, \+w whom\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w lord\+w* \+w when he cometh\+w* \+w shall find\+w* \+w so\+w* \+w doing\+w*.
\+w Verily\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w That\+w* \+w he shall make\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w ruler\+w* \+w over\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w goods\+w*.
\+w But\+w* \+w and if\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w evil\+w* \+w servant\+w* \+w shall say\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w heart\+w*, \+w My\+w* \+w lord\+w* \+w delayeth\+w* \+w his coming\+w*;
\+w And\+w* \+w shall begin\+w* \+w to smite\+w* \+add his\+add* \+w fellowservants\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w to eat\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w drink\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w the drunken\+w*;

\+w The lord\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w servant\+w* \+w shall come\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w a day\+w* \+w when\+w* \+w he looketh\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w for\+w* \+add him\+add*, \+w and\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w an hour\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w he is\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w aware of\+w*,

\+w And\+w* \+w shall cut\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w asunder\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w appoint\+w* \+add him\+add* \+w his\+w* \+w portion\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w the hypocrites\+w*: \+w there\+w* \+w shall be\+w* \+w weeping\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w gnashing\+w* \+w of teeth\+w*.
